ddls:
CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., pump, motor, conveyor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date the warranty expires */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, vibration) */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the sensor is attached to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date the next calibration is due */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value the sensor can measure */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value the sensor can measure */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was collected */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the reading (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that operated during the cycle */,
  "cycle_date" TEXT /* Date the cycle started */,
  "cycle_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cycle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the cycle */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the cycle */,
  "cycle_status" TEXT /* Status of the cycle (e.g., completed, interrupted) */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycles_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment the setting applies to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" REAL /* Value of the setting */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the setting value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the setting */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the setting */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_date" TEXT /* Date the alarm was triggered */,
  "alarm_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alarm */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the alarm was triggered */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alarm (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Date the alarm was acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Time the alarm was acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who acknowledged the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, in progress, scheduled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintenance, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was modified */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit entry was created */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the audit entry was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was predicted to fail */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_failure_date" TEXT /* Predicted date of failure */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was predicted to fail */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_failure_date" TEXT /* Predicted date of failure */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "RUL" (
  "RUL_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RUL entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that the RUL applies to */,
  "RUL_date" TEXT /* Date the RUL was calculated */,
  "RUL_value" INTEGER /* Remaining useful life of the equipment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the RUL was calculated */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the RUL calculation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the RUL (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("RUL_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_RUL_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycles_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that the summary applies to */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of cycles completed */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of cycles */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of cycles */,
  "max_duration" INTEGER /* Maximum duration of cycles */,
  "min_duration" INTEGER /* Minimum duration of cycles */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the summary (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycles_summary_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that the setting applies to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" REAL /* Value of the setting */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the setting value */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the setting */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the setting */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the setting was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_settings_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
